moves.startingMovesNote: You start with Censure, Chronicler of Stonetop, plus 2 more of your choice.

backgrounds.label: Legacy
backgrounds.description:
You are the latest in a long line of Judges—born here, apprenticed to the prior Judge, and charged with the passing of the mantle. The Chronicle is a rich repository of lore, but there's no index, so good luck finding anything.

When you Know Things about the people or history of Stonetop, you have advantage.

When you spend days, weeks, or months poring over the Chronicle, ask the GM and the GM will tell you what you learn in that time.

backgrounds.label: Missionary
backgrounds.description:
You are part of a larger order of Judges, sent here to protect the flickering flame of civilization. The Chronicle is relatively new; your position in town is far from certain.

When you call upon the Judge of another steading for aid or information, they are oathbound to give it. You are likewise oathbound to support them.

You have an aviary in addition to your usual choice of special possessions. When you send a message via trained bird, the GM will tell you if and when you receive a response, and what it says.

backgrounds.label: Prophet
backgrounds.description:
The line of Judges was broken long ago, the Chronicle lost or fallen into ruin. Aratis has called you personally to her service through dreams, omens, and visions. Some in town resent the authority you've assumed.

When you spend a few days communing with Aratis about a threat facing Stonetop or civilization as a whole, roll +WIS: on a 7+, Aratis reveals the course of action she would have you take; on a 10+, you also hold 2 Sanction. While acting on her orders, spend 1 Sanction to add +1 to a roll you just made.

instincts.description: To increase your status or influence.
To seek a path that makes everyone happy.
To strictly adhere to rules and traditions.
To judge quickly and without doubt.

origin.region: Lygos or some other southern town

specialPossessions.pickNote: Pick 1, in addition to your symbol of authority and scribe's kit

options.label: Symbol of authority
options.description: your official badge and symbol; recognized throughout the Manmarch.

options.label: Scribe's kit
options.description: parchment, ink, pigments, vials, quills, ◇ a notebook, etc.

options.label: Aviary
options.description: a building with trained birds to carry messages. When you send a message by trained bird, the GM will tell you when (or if) you receive a reply, and what it says.

options.label: Carpenter's tools
options.description: chisels, files, nails, pitch, ◇ prybars, ◇ saws, ○○ firkins, barrels, etc.

options.label: Engineer's tools
options.description: measuring string, stakes, levels, plumb bobs, ◇ compasses, ◇ drawing tools, plans, etc.

options.label: Smithy
options.description: (or access to it): iron goods, ingots, thick gloves, ◇ tongs, ◇ bellows, an anvil, etc.

stonetop.statsNote: Assign these scores to your stats: +2, +1, +1, +0, +0, -1

system.description: Look here at this little town, this candleflame in the darkness. Its very existence is an act of courage and faith. And Aratis has charged you to keep it: to settle its disputes; to chronicle its tales; to defend it from darkness and ruin. Take up your hammer, Judge. Your town needs you.
